languages.original_text: "You speak quite cogently for an inferior being. It is amusing, considering the obvious damage to your reasoning. If you are sufficiently deferential, I will reward your curiosity... perhaps."

languages.text: "Говоришь весьма вразумительно для низшего существа. Это забавно, учитывая явное повреждение рассудка. Если будешь достаточно почтителен, я вознагражу твое любопытство... может быть".
"You speak quite cogently for an inferior being. It is amusing, considering the obvious damage to your reasoning. If you are sufficiently deferential, I will reward your curiosity... perhaps."

"You speak quite cogently for an inferior being. It is amusing, considering the obvious damage to your reasoning. If you are sufficiently deferential, I will reward your curiosity... perhaps."
"You speak quite cogently for an inferior being. It is amusing, considering the obvious damage to your reasoning. If you are sufficiently deferential, I will reward your curiosity... perhaps."

languages.text: «Hablas de forma muy convincente para ser una criatura inferior. Es interesante, teniendo en cuenta los daños evidentes que ha sufrido tu raciocinio. Si te comportas con la deferencia debida, recompensaré tu curiosidad... si me apetece».
languages.original_text: "You speak quite cogently for an inferior being. It is amusing, considering the obvious damage to your reasoning. If you are sufficiently deferential, I will reward your curiosity... perhaps."

traits.locale_text: «Hablas de forma muy convincente para ser una criatura inferior. Es interesante, teniendo en cuenta los daños evidentes que ha sufrido tu raciocinio. Si te comportas con la deferencia debida, recompensaré tu curiosidad... si me apetece».

languages.text: 「劣等な存在にしては、ずいぶんと筋の通った話し方をするものだ。貴様の理性が明らかに損なわれていることを思えば、愉快なことだがな。十分にへりくだるなら、貴様の好奇心に報いてやろう……気が向けば、だが」
languages.original_text: "You speak quite cogently for an inferior being. It is amusing, considering the obvious damage to your reasoning. If you are sufficiently deferential, I will reward your curiosity... perhaps."

traits.locale_text: 「劣等な存在にしては、ずいぶんと筋の通った話し方をするものだ。貴様の理性が明らかに損なわれていることを思えば、愉快なことだがな。十分にへりくだるなら、貴様の好奇心に報いてやろう……気が向けば、だが」

languages.text: “以一个劣等生物的标准来说，你的话倒是相当有条理。再考虑到你明显受损的理性思维，这就更为有趣了。如果你表现得足够恭顺，也许我会满足你的好奇心……”
languages.original_text: "You speak quite cogently for an inferior being. It is amusing, considering the obvious damage to your reasoning. If you are sufficiently deferential, I will reward your curiosity... perhaps."

traits.locale_text: “以一个劣等生物的标准来说，你的话倒是相当有条理。再考虑到你明显受损的理性思维，这就更为有趣了。如果你表现得足够恭顺，也许我会满足你的好奇心……”

languages.text: "Für ein niederes Wesen klingt Ihr recht überzeugend. Amüsant, wenn man den offensichtlichen Schaden Eures Verstandes bedenkt. Wenn Ihr entsprechend respektvoll seid, werde ich Eure Neugier stillen ... vielleicht."
languages.original_text: "You speak quite cogently for an inferior being. It is amusing, considering the obvious damage to your reasoning. If you are sufficiently deferential, I will reward your curiosity... perhaps."

traits.locale_text: "Für ein niederes Wesen klingt Ihr recht überzeugend. Amüsant, wenn man den offensichtlichen Schaden Eures Verstandes bedenkt. Wenn Ihr entsprechend respektvoll seid, werde ich Eure Neugier stillen ... vielleicht."

languages.text: « Votre manière de parler est convaincante, pour un être inférieur. C'est amusant, compte tenu des défauts évidents de votre raisonnement. Si vous faites preuve de déférence, je satisferai votre curiosité. Éventuellement. »
languages.original_text: "You speak quite cogently for an inferior being. It is amusing, considering the obvious damage to your reasoning. If you are sufficiently deferential, I will reward your curiosity... perhaps."

traits.locale_text: « Votre manière de parler est convaincante, pour un être inférieur. C'est amusant, compte tenu des défauts évidents de votre raisonnement. Si vous faites preuve de déférence, je satisferai votre curiosité. Éventuellement. »

languages.text: "Aşağılık bir varlık için oldukça inandırıcı konuşuyorsun. Mantığındaki bariz hasar göz önüne alındığında bu eğlenceli. Eğer yeterince saygılı olursan merakını ödüllendiririm... Belki."
languages.original_text: "You speak quite cogently for an inferior being. It is amusing, considering the obvious damage to your reasoning. If you are sufficiently deferential, I will reward your curiosity... perhaps."
